description_long: This is a compact, rectangular radio receiver with a sleek black exterior and a prominent telescopic metal antenna extending from the top left corner. The front face features a large speaker grille on the left, a blue frequency display panel in the center, and two round, light blue control knobs on the right for tuning and volume adjustment. The frequency display is marked with white numbers and lines, making it easy to read. The body appears to be made primarily of plastic, with metallic elements for the antenna and internal components. The back and sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist design. This radio receiver is portable and suitable for use in various urban environments, such as parks, garages, or street corners.
description: A sleek black radio receiver with a telescopic antenna, large speaker grille, blue frequency display, and two control knobs. Its compact, rectangular design is both functional and portable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, blue frequency display, two control knobs, and the extended antenna.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and protruding control knobs, with the antenna visible from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, featureless back and the base of the antenna.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the control knobs from a different angle.
